project.name: Blonde Blazer Romance
project.objective: Create a romantic short-form fashion promo with a premium editorial feel.

global_style.reference_policy: Use scene reference assets as semantic guidance. The role and prompt_hint fields explain what each image/video means.

general_reference_assets.path: Supporting Data/general_assets/video/general/Dispatch all Blonde Blazer Romance Scenes.mp4
general_reference_assets.label: primary romance promo motion reference
general_reference_assets.prompt_hint: Use this video for pacing, elegant movement, color treatment, and fashion-promo rhythm.

scenes.name: Scene 1
scenes.description: A portrait beauty close-up of the blonde blazer lead talent with the entire face visible in frame, centered eye contact, hairline and chin safely inside the crop, then a subtle confident smile.
scenes.text overlay: Fall in love with the look
scenes.subject: lead_talent
scenes.notes: Prioritize full-face framing and identity fidelity. Keep the face centered with no cropped forehead, chin, or cheek; shoulders/blazer may appear only as secondary wardrobe context.

reference_assets.label: lead talent face reference
reference_assets.prompt_hint: Use as the primary character reference. Preserve the lead talent's facial proportions, blonde styling, centered eye contact, and full-face beauty framing with forehead, chin, and both cheeks visible.

reference_assets.label: blonde blazer wardrobe reference
reference_assets.prompt_hint: Use this for blazer color, fit, neckline, and luxury fashion styling. Keep wardrobe secondary so it does not push the face out of frame.

reference_assets.label: close-up composition reference
reference_assets.prompt_hint: Use as composition guidance: full face centered, stable eye contact, soft editorial lighting, no half-face crop.
